title: Features Schema
description: Provider-scoped service feature catalog. Each row has a unified Porto `porto_id` (cross-provider vocabulary) and a provider `id` (this bundle’s primary key; `services[].features` references `id`, and may match `porto_id` when vocabulary aligns). Native-market `name` and English `label`.

provider.description: Provider id (must match global/providers.json and this file path)

id.description: Provider-scoped feature id in this catalog; referenced from services.json feature lists within the same provider

porto_id.description: Unified Porto feature id for cross-provider resolution and tooling (stable across operators when the capability is the same)

name.description: Native-market display name (operator primary language, e.g. DE/FR)

label.description: English human-readable label for unified tooling and docs
